title: LnY is number 15 in 50 greatest weapons of all timelol
display_title: LnY is number 15 in 50 greatest weapons of all timelol
wikitext:
[]: LnY is number 15 in 50 greatest weapons of all time...lol             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Nov 23, 2007 11:11 am http://www.wizarduniverse.com/magazine/wizard/006398688.cfm?page=2 Our big stick has gotten into a little list...but look at the butchery! The blurb for the LnY (Number 15) is so totally wrong, not to mention that they call it a Lance and not a Spear! And they call an Eva a robot too. (Yes, I don't know whether to laugh or cry)

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Fri Nov 23, 2007 11:14 am I spit upon that list for its complete and utter lack of M41.

[]: Re: LnY is number 15 in 50 greatest weapons of all time...lo             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri Nov 23, 2007 11:16 am UrsusArctos wrote: Our big stick has gotten into a little list...but look at the butchery! The blurb for the LnY (Number 15) is so totally wrong, not to mention that they call it a Lance and not a Spear! And they call an Eva a robot too.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Nov 23, 2007 2:14 pm I wouldn't exactly say the Lance's entry is inaccurate , except for the only being able to be thrown by giant robots bit. Actually, other than that, it doesn't say much about it. >_>

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Fri Nov 23, 2007 2:21 pm Our Lance is #15 right behind Proton Pack's.Well, I can't disagree with them there. Proton Packs are pretty damn cool. *gasp* WHAT WOULD HAPPEN IF THE LANCE CROSSED THE STREAM?! Whoah... :shock:

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Fri Nov 23, 2007 4:42 pm Its too bad that I'm unfamiliar with 80% of the crap on that list.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Nov 23, 2007 8:28 pm BobBQ wrote: I spit upon that list for its complete and utter lack of M41.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Nov 23, 2007 9:33 pm Wizard is the group that publishes Anime Insider*, as well as some other magazines I've heard of before. Still, pretty cool. (Yui-sama DOES approve?) *In an issue awhile back of Top Ten Dysfunctional Couples, Shinji & Asuka made # 3. Great paraphrased line: "They've strangled each other at two separate times...True love, folks!"

[]:             Quote Post by Wevangeliwon » Sat Nov 24, 2007 12:27 am That is cool. I would put a couple things below it, but I am glad the series has got some recognition.

[]:             Quote Post by ThroneofDravaris » Sat Nov 24, 2007 12:41 am Any list that includes the gunblade has about zero credibility.

[]:             Quote Post by Semisubtle » Sat Nov 24, 2007 11:53 am I like that they recognized it, and I don't have a problem with the little blurb it's given either. Not everyone who reads the list will have seen Evangelion, and putting 'robots' instead of 'beings that are ACTUALLY humans but bigger, copied from things called Angels, and have to be restrained by armor' saves them from bringing up a whole separate issue. They have to simplify stuff for that kind of thing. It happens pretty frequently.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Nov 24, 2007 12:02 pm Semisubtle wrote: I like that they recognized it, and I don't have a problem with the little blurb it's given either. Not everyone who reads the list will have seen Evangelion, and putting 'robots' instead of 'beings that are ACTUALLY humans but bigger, copied from things called Angels, and have to be restrained by armor' saves them from bringing up a whole separate issue. They have to simplify stuff for that kind of thing. It happens pretty frequently.

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Sat Nov 24, 2007 2:38 pm They didn't put the 460mm gun. I am appalled.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Sat Nov 24, 2007 5:51 pm UrsusArctos wrote: The blurb for the LnY (Number 15) is so totally wrong, not to mention that they call it a Lance and not a Spear!

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Nov 26, 2007 6:26 am A lance is pretty different from a regular spear, Zuggy, particularly where you hold it. You hold a lance by the very end, while LnY is held and thrown like a javelin. And there's always episode 25'.

[]:             Quote Post by raphael » Mon Nov 26, 2007 7:07 am Zugzwang wrote: What on earth is a green lantern power ring?

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Mon Nov 26, 2007 1:50 pm UrsusArctos wrote: A lance is pretty different from a regular spear, Zuggy, particularly where you hold it. You hold a lance by the very end, while LnY is held and thrown like a javelin. And there's always episode 25'.

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Mon Nov 26, 2007 3:01 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: *In an issue awhile back of Top Ten Dysfunctional Couples, Shinji & Asuka made # 3. Great paraphrased line: "They've strangled each other at two separate times...True love, folks!"

[]:             Quote Post by Themaninblack » Mon Nov 26, 2007 3:08 pm Tokpile Quohog wrote: Sailor Star Dust wrote: *In an issue awhile back of Top Ten Dysfunctional Couples, Shinji & Asuka made # 3. Great paraphrased line: "They've strangled each other at two separate times...True love, folks!"

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Nov 26, 2007 6:25 pm I shudder to think how the top 2 must be. :cry:
